words.meaning: 热衷的，热心的，渴望的；敏锐的，敏捷的；激烈的，紧张的； 锋利的

words.meaning: 劳动；劳动力，工人 v. 劳动；努力
words.example: As a result, 51% of all women aged 14 to 64 are now economically active in the labour market.

words.example: There is a serious deterioration in relations between the two countries.

words.meaning: 三部分的；三倍的 v. （使）增至三倍

words.exampleCn: 整体来 看，欧洲国家认为森林在以下三方面起到了作用：生物、经济以及休闲娱 乐。

words.example: The police offer those condemned to spend five days a week in an urban environment with an unrivalled area of freedom to unwind and take part in a range of leisure activities, such as hunting, riding and hiking.

words.example: The forest policy must transcend national frontiers and generations of people, and it must allow for the inevitable changes that take place in the forests, in needs, and hence in policy.

words.example: The condition appears to result from the cumulative effect of a number of factors, with atmospheric pollutants the principal culprits.

words.example: Gharib and Graff set themselves the task of raising a 4.5-metre stone column from horizontal to vertical, using no source of energy except the wind.

words.example: Gharib has already been contacted by a civil engineer in Nicaragua, who wants to put up buildings with adobe roofs supported by concrete arches on a site that heavy equipment can't reach.

words.example: The council, which was founded in 1996, certifies fisheries that meet high environmental standards, enabling them to use a label that recognizes their environmental responsibility.

words.example: The physiological arousal declined quickly to the same levels as those of the control subjects.
words.exampleCn: 生理激发水平迅速下降到 了同受控对象一样的程度。

words.example: The police alleged that the man was murdered but they have not given proof yet.

words.example: The arrested offender continued to assert that she was innocent.

words.example: They are analysed to assess the ability of the soil or subsoil material to support vegetation.

words.example: This fragrance evokes the memory of a cool, summer evening.

words.example: In this hospital, children under 16 don't need to pay, and the same thing goes for people who have retired.
words.exampleCn: 在这家医 院，16岁以下的儿童免费就诊，退休人员也可享受同等待遇。

words.example: The body is pretty good at self-repair. A strain to a limb, though painful at the time, generally resolves itself.

words.example: The hotel provided the best available accommodation, food and beverage, and meeting facilities in Sydney's southern suburbs.
words.exampleCn: 在悉尼南部市郊，这家旅馆提供的住房、餐饮及会议设施是最 棒的。

words.example: In 1990, smoking caused more than 84,000 deaths, mainly resulting from such problems as pneumonia, bronchitis and influenza.

words.example: The shift of food-production from Europe to regions without farm subsidies will undoubtedly mean more pressure to convert natural habitat into farmland.

words.example: The creation of healthy social environment must address issues such as poverty, pollution, natural resource depletion, social alienation and poor working conditions.

words.example: Will you be frank with me about this matter?

words.example: Scrapping farm-price support and protection for coal- mining offers a two-fold bonus: a cleaner environment and a more efficient economy.

words.exampleCn: 今天是农历八月十五，一 轮满月挂在夜空中。

words.example: The witness's descriptions were too imprecise to be of any real value.
words.exampleCn: 目击者的描述太不精确了，没有任何实际价值。

words.example: The volcano has been inactive for 50 years.
words.exampleCn: 这座火山已经 有50年没有喷发了。

words.meaning: 开始，创造，发起；接纳（新成员），让…加入 n. （新）加入组织者
words.example: The government has initiated a programme of social welfare policy.
words.exampleCn: 政府已经在社会福利政策上发起一项新的计划。

words.example: Longitude means the distance of an imaginary line from the top to the bottom of the Earth.
words.exampleCn: 经线是人们想象出来的从地球顶 部到其底部的距离。

words.example: People were dying of starvation in the disaster area while governments procrastinated.
words.exampleCn: 灾区的人们快要饿死了，而政府行 动却拖拖拉拉。

words.example: Nowadays, men who do the cooking are something of a rarity.
words.exampleCn: 现在会做饭的男人十分稀少。

words.example: The monks secluded themselves from the rest of society.
words.exampleCn: 僧侣们将自己与世隔绝。

words.meaning: 进行中的 n. 前进，发展
words.example: Manufacturers usually consider quality control to be an ongoing process.
words.exampleCn: 制造商们通常认为质量管理是一个不断发展的过程。

words.example: Mary prefers almonds to peanuts.
words.exampleCn: 和花生比，玛丽更喜欢杏 仁。

words.meaning: 喂养，为…提供食物；吃，以…为食 n. 饲料
words.example: To feed an increasingly hungry world, farmers need every incentive to use their soil and water effectively and efficiently.
words.exampleCn: 为了养活世界上日益增加的人口，农民需要利用每一个激 励措施来有效并且高效地使用他们的土地和水资源。

words.example: The scenery is as beautiful as a painting.
words.exampleCn: 这里风景美丽 如画。

words.example: Real wages have stagnated since that year.
words.exampleCn: 实际工资从那 一年开始就没再涨过。

words.example: Carbon dioxide, nitrogen dioxide, ozone were among the pollutants monitored by the WHO.
words.exampleCn: 二氧化碳、二氧化氮和臭氧都属于 世界卫生组织监控的污染物。

words.example: Water from these subterranean lakes can be pumped to the surface and tapped.
words.exampleCn: 可以将这些地下湖泊中的水抽出地面加以利用。

words.example: I owed the bank rather a lot of money a few years ago.
words.exampleCn: 几年前，我欠了银行一大笔钱。

words.example: People can call the Ministry of Justice for free legal advice.
words.exampleCn: 人们可以打电话到司法部进行免费的法律咨询。

words.example: The bar codes on the products are read by lasers.
words.exampleCn: 这些产 品上的条形码是用激光读取的。

words.meaning: 个别的，单独的；独特的 n. 个人，个体
words.example: The food is served in individual portions.
words.exampleCn: 食物是按一人 一份供给的。

words.example: Our long association with your company has brought great benefits.
words.exampleCn: 我方和贵公司的长期合作已经带来了巨大的利益。

words.example: Some worry that governments and industries will be tempted to use the technology to monitor individual behaviours.
words.exampleCn: 一些人担心，政府和企业有意使用这一技术来监控个人行为。

words.example: Shall we have a rest in the shade beneath these trees?
words.exampleCn: 我们在树阴里休息一下好吗？

words.example: Is extinction a naturally occurring phenomenon?
words.exampleCn: 物种灭绝 是一种自然发生的现象吗？

words.example: A microscope can magnify these germs.
words.exampleCn: 显微镜可以将这些细 菌放大。

words.meaning: 个人财产，（尤指）遗产；土地，地产，（尤指）庄园
words.example: My accountant estimated the value of my estate.
words.exampleCn: 我的会计 师评估了我的个人财产值。

words.meaning: 使泄气，使灰心；阻止，劝阻
words.example: Tom was discouraged from using the new car because of its bad assembly.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆不愿意驾驶这辆新车，因为它的配置很差，这让 汤姆很泄气。

words.example: She had papers, pens and a novel inside her briefcase.
words.exampleCn: 她的公文包里有论文、钢笔和小说。

words.meaning: 候选人，候补者；申请求职者；报考者
words.example: These forms have to be filled out by the candidates.
words.exampleCn: 这 些表格需要由申请者来填写。

words.example: Salt helps melt ice.
words.exampleCn: 盐可以使冰融化。

words.example: Joey and Monica looked at each other and shrugged.
words.exampleCn: 乔伊 和莫妮卡互相对视，耸了耸肩。

words.example: The frightened child spoke in a halting voice.
words.exampleCn: 这个受了 惊吓的孩子说话结结巴巴。

words.example: Watching TV can help me relax.
words.exampleCn: 看电视可以帮助我放松。

words.meaning: 宇宙空间；航空航天技术
words.example: This article is mainly about the applications of AI to aerospace.
words.exampleCn: 这篇文章主要论述了人工智能在航空航天领域的应用。

words.meaning: 假想，假定，猜想，推测；假定，让；期望做（某事），认为应该做（某事）
words.example: I suppose you're going to tell me the whole history of banana growing now, aren't you?
words.exampleCn: 我猜你是打算现在给我讲解香蕉种植 的整个历史，对吗？

words.example: Tom thought his approach was tenable.
words.exampleCn: 汤姆认为他的方法是 站得住脚的。

words.meaning: 支撑，撑住，承受住；维持，保持；经受，遭受，忍耐
words.example: Thousands of lakes are so polluted that they can no longer sustain fish life.
words.exampleCn: 数千个湖泊受到非常严重的污染，已无法再 维持鱼类的生存。

words.example: Agnes has a wheelbarrow full of straw and manure.
words.exampleCn: 阿格尼 丝推着满满一推车的稻草和肥料。

words.meaning: 边缘；边界 v. 与…接壤；接近，毗邻
words.example: We passed the border into Mexico.
words.exampleCn: 我们穿越边境进入了墨西 哥。

words.meaning: 药剂师，配药师；分配者，施予者；自动售货机
words.example: Japan's largest maker of cash dispensers is developing new machines that incorporate iris scanners.
words.exampleCn: 日本最大的提款机制 造商正在开发配有虹膜扫描仪的新机器。

words.example: He put his hand over the receiver in order to get the signal better.
words.exampleCn: 他将手放到接收器上以便收到更清晰的信号。

words.meaning: 垄断，专卖；垄断商品，专卖商品
words.example: In some countries, stamps are a government monopoly.
words.exampleCn: 在 一些国家，邮票为政府垄断品。

words.example: Since you hate bureaucracy, you must learn to work with bureaucracy to save it from itself.
words.exampleCn: 既然你们痛恨官僚主义，那你们 就必须学会与官僚主义共事，只有这样才能将其克服。

words.example: They spent years completing the construction of the new airport.
words.exampleCn: 他们花了数年的时间才建成新机场。

words.example: The socio-ecological view of health was endorsed at the first International Conference of Health Promotion.
words.exampleCn: 关于健康的社 会生态学观点在第一届世界健康促进会上得到了认可。

words.example: Two American researchers studied the brains of human embryos and discovered that the left-right asymmetry exists before birth.
words.exampleCn: 两位美国研究人员在对人类胚胎的大脑进行研究后发现， 左右脑不对称的现象在出生前就存在。

words.example: The silicon chip is one of the most significant inventions in the past 50 years.
words.exampleCn: 硅片是过去50年中最重要的发明之 一。

words.example: The scientists are using genetics to improve the intelligence of mice.
words.exampleCn: 科学家们正在利用基因技术提高老鼠的智力。

words.meaning: 成熟的；深思熟虑的 v. （使）成熟
words.example: Jane is very mature for her age.
words.exampleCn: 简年龄不大，却很成熟。

words.example: 10% of the data was discarded as unreliable.
words.exampleCn: 10％的数据 因不可靠而被废弃。

words.example: You can pay the membership fee by cheque.
words.exampleCn: 你可以用支票交 会员费。

words.meaning: 烤过的 n. 烤肉 v. 烤，炙
words.example: Roast dinner sounds ordinary but it is really tasty.
words.exampleCn: 烧 烤大餐听起来很普通，但味道的确很好。

words.meaning: 使计算机化；用计算机做；用计算机储存（信息）
words.example: It's reported that 80% of sections in the company have been completely computerized.
words.exampleCn: 据报道，该公司80％的部门已经完全计 算机化了。

words.meaning: 宣扬，宣传，推广；使普及，使通俗化
words.example: Internet has an important role to play in popularizing new scientific knowledge and spreading new information.
words.exampleCn: 因特网在 普及新的科学知识以及传播新信息方面起着重要的作用。

words.example: Let's not devalue his work unjustly.
words.exampleCn: 我们不要不公正地贬 低他的工作。

words.meaning: 渡船；摆渡 v. 渡运
words.example: In Venice, which is famous as the city of water, the children there need to be ferried between school and home every day.
words.exampleCn: 在著名的水城威尼斯，孩子们每天都要乘船来往于学校和家之间。

words.meaning: 铁；烙铁，熨斗 v. （用熨斗）熨，烫平
words.example: It will take me about half an hour to iron that dress.
words.exampleCn: 烫平那条连衣裙，我大概要花上半个小时的时间。

words.meaning: 恃强凌弱者 vt. 恐吓；胁迫，欺负
words.example: When confronted with bullying and threats, most of the people will choose to give in or keep silent.
words.exampleCn: 当面对恐吓和威胁 时，大多数人选择屈服或沉默。

words.example: The pure, innocent love of a young couple became the main storyline of this film.
words.exampleCn: 一对年轻夫妻纯真无瑕的爱情是这部电 影的主要故事情节。

words.meaning: 轨道；影响范围，势力范围 v. 沿轨道运行；围绕…运动
words.example: There have been hundreds of satellites put into orbit round the earth this year.
words.exampleCn: 今年数以百计的人造卫星被送入环绕地球 的轨道。

words.meaning: 战斗，搏斗 vt. 战斗，与…搏斗；防止
words.example: The state government is spending millions of dollars in its attempt to combat gun abuse.
words.exampleCn: 州政府花费数百万美元试图防止滥 用枪支。

words.example: The white-collar workers in big cities tend to suffer from fatigue easily which makes them slothful in the office.
words.exampleCn: 大 城市的白领阶层往往容易患上疲劳症，使他们在工作中反应迟钝。

words.example: The scientists have confirmed that the earth will face a catastrophic explosion in 2012 is only a rumor.
words.exampleCn: 科学家已经证实地 球将在2012年遭遇毁灭性爆炸的说法只是谣言。

words.example: Anyone can abide by what he or she said, but it doesn't mean all of them are correct.
words.exampleCn: 任何人都可以坚持自己所说的话，但这 并不意味着他们全都是正确的。

words.example: According to the statistics, the allure of the big city has weakened because of high housing prices.
words.exampleCn: 数据显示，高房价降 低了大城市的吸引力。

words.example: Oxygen masks are used by the scientists for a shortage of oxygen at the top of the mountain.
words.exampleCn: 由于山顶缺氧，科学家需要戴 氧气罩。

words.example: Ageism is pervasive and entrenched in our society.
words.exampleCn: 年龄 歧视在我们的社会中非常普遍，而且根深蒂固。

words.meaning: 侵入，侵占，侵犯；侵蚀，蚕食（土地）
words.example: It has been proved that human activities have encroached upon the survival of the creatures in nature.
words.exampleCn: 经证实，人类的活动 已经侵害了自然界中生物的生存。

words.meaning: 极好的；荒诞的，奇异的；不切实际的
words.example: Kids like spending a great deal of pocket money on fantastic toys instead of useful books.
words.exampleCn: 孩子们喜欢花大量的零花钱 购买奇特的玩具，而不是有用的书籍。

words.example: As far as I'm concerned, the practice of killing rare wild animals for food and money is utterly abhorrent and should be punished by law.
words.exampleCn: 我认为，为获取食物和金钱而猎杀珍稀野生动物的 行径可恶至极，应该受到法律的制裁。

words.meaning: 把…强加给，使遭受，使承受
words.example: Doctors warned parents that children aged two or three years could inflict various injuries in daily life.
words.exampleCn: 医生警告父 母：两三岁的儿童在日常生活中可能遭受各种伤害。

words.meaning: （使）倾斜，倾侧；（使）倾向于，偏向 n. 倾斜，倾侧
words.example: Government's fiscal policy will be tilting toward agricultural development.
words.exampleCn: 政府的财政政策将倾向于农业发展。

words.example: Mosquitoes will suck human's blood. What's even worse, they will transmit many diseases.
words.exampleCn: 蚊子会吸人类的血。更糟的是，它 们会传播多种疾病。

words.meaning: 冒犯的；使人不快的；无礼的；攻击性的，进攻性的 n. 进攻， 攻击；攻势
words.example: Every year, BBC receives plenty of complaints from the public about their offensive remarks during the interviews. BBC
words.exampleCn: 每年都会收到公众对采访中出现的冒犯性话语的大量投诉。

words.meaning: 奢侈的，铺张的；（言行等）无节制的，过分的，放肆的
words.example: The majority of people maintain that mass media has no rights to report the extravagant lifestyle and privacy of a star.
words.exampleCn: 绝大多数人认为大众媒体无权报道明星奢侈的生活方式以及隐私。

words.example: In recent years, more and more begrimed articles and videos have spread by means of Internet and mobile phones.
words.exampleCn: 近年 来，越来越多内容污秽的文章和视频通过因特网和手机进行传播。

words.example: Most of the surveyed citizens argued that the government had shown a ruthless disregard for their basic human rights.
words.exampleCn: 大 部分接受调查的公民争论道，政府残忍地无视他们的基本人权。

words.example: If you take a presentation on some specific fields, to avoid confusing the audience, you should try to decrease jargon in your speech.
words.exampleCn: 在做有关某一特定领域的报告时，为避免听众产生疑惑 和不解，你应该尽量少用术语。

words.example: Millions of years ago, changes in the Earth's climate gave rise to diverse species in the tropical rain forest.
words.exampleCn: 数百万 年前，地球气候的变化导致了这片热带雨林物种的多样性。

words.example: This is non-smoking section. Please extinguish all cigarettes.
words.exampleCn: 这里是非吸烟区，请将所有香烟熄灭。

words.example: If the government continues to increase the tax, it will estrange itself from the public in the end.
words.exampleCn: 如果政府继续增加税 收，终将脱离民众。

words.example: Besides grandeur of scale and simplicity of geometric forms, the use of columns is also the representative feature of neoclassical architecture.
words.exampleCn: 除了规模的宏伟和几何形状的简洁性外， 使用圆柱也是新古典建筑的标志性特征。

words.example: Mothers might be biased to always think their children are the best in the world.
words.exampleCn: 妈妈们可能有些偏颇，她们总是认为自己 的孩子是世界上最棒的。

words.example: The increasingly serious air pollution is threatening the health of people living in the grimy industrial cities.
words.exampleCn: 日益 严重的空气污染正威胁着生活于肮脏的工业城市中的人们的健康。

words.example: Although not all people like the flavor of onion, ginger or garlic, they are good immune system enhancer.
words.exampleCn: 尽管不是所有人 都喜欢洋葱、姜、蒜的味道，但它们都具有极佳的增强免疫的功能。

words.meaning: 较远的；不可告人的，隐秘的，秘密的
words.example: In current society, when one actively supports someone who needs help, he may be suspected of having an ulterior motive by some people.
words.exampleCn: 在当今社会，当一个人积极帮助需要帮助的人时，有些 人可能怀疑他别有用心。

words.meaning: 腐化，腐蚀；使堕落；破坏，损坏；（计算机文件等）出错 a. 堕落的，腐化的；腐败的，贪污的
words.example: People are usually annoyed by the sudden incident that the data on the hard drive of their computers is corrupted by the power cut.
words.exampleCn: 电脑硬盘驱动器上的数据因断电而损坏，这类突发事件 常常让人很恼怒。

words.meaning: （法律、规则等）严格的，苛刻的；（财政状况）紧缩的，短缺 的，银根紧的；迫切的
words.example: A stringent regulation on security has guaranteed the success of Olympic Games.
words.exampleCn: 严格的安保制度确保了奥运会的成功举办。

words.meaning: 生手，新手；初学者；新信徒，初学修士（或修女）
words.example: In 2001, China, a novice in WTO, had many different opportunities and challenges to face.
words.exampleCn: 2001年，作为WTO的新成员， 中国面临着许多不同的机遇和挑战。

words.example: The survey reveals that most of the candidates' job applications have been hindered by their lack of relevant working experience.
words.exampleCn: 调查显示，大部分求职者因缺乏相关的工作经验而 导致其工作申请受阻。

words.meaning: 穷困的，赤贫的；贫乏的，贫瘠的；枯竭的
words.example: It is necessary to carry out the project of returning farmland to forests since overfarming has created much impoverished soil.
words.exampleCn: 过度耕作已经造成了大量土地的贫瘠，所以必须实 行退耕还林。

words.example: To the elephant, the stream is quite shallow so it is able to walk across it. But to the rabbit, it can be a murderer.
words.exampleCn: 对大象来说，河流很浅，能够跨过去；但对兔子来说，就很危险，可能会 被淹死。

words.meaning: 淹没，泛滥；使不胜负荷，使应接不暇
words.example: Due to the successive heavy rain, the dam of the Nile breaks, which inundates large parts of the town and farmlands.
words.exampleCn: 由于连降大雨，尼罗河大坝溃堤，淹没了该镇的大部分地区和农田。

words.example: The sharp increase in food price over the last few months has eroded the public's confidence in the government's policy.
words.exampleCn: 过去几个月食品价格大幅上涨，削弱了公众对政府政策的信心。

words.meaning: 注定…失败（或遭殃、死亡等），使…在劫难逃 n. 毁灭；厄 运，劫数
words.example: Some people hold that if this kind of rare animal is not well protected, it will be doomed to extinction.
words.exampleCn: 一些人认为，如 果这种珍稀动物得不到很好的保护，它注定会灭绝。

words.meaning: 使疏远，使不友好；转让，让渡（财产等）
words.example: Very talented people may feel alienated from the public.
words.exampleCn: 天才出众的人可能觉得与大众格格不入。

words.meaning: 黄铜制的，黄铜色的；厚颜无耻的
words.example: How can you believe such a brazen lie?
words.exampleCn: 你怎能相信如此厚 颜无耻的谎言？

words.example: People in that tribe used to think that the tortoises and turtles came from hell.
words.exampleCn: 那个部落的人过去常认为陆龟和海龟来自 地狱。

words.example: We deeply commiserated with job hunters who were on the loss of their jobs.
words.exampleCn: 我们对那些失去工作的求职者深表同情。

words.meaning: 亡命之徒，逃犯，被剥夺法律权益者 vt. 宣布…为非法，使…成 为非法
words.example: So far, the government's attempt to outlaw drunken driving has proved to be unsuccessful.
words.exampleCn: 到目前为止，事实证明该政 府试图使酒后驾车成为非法行为的努力失败了。

words.example: According to the report, 30% of graduates will spend about four months pounding the pavement in search of a job.
words.exampleCn: 据报 道，30％的毕业生要花大约四个月的时间四处奔波寻找一份工作。

words.example: In comparison with modern mass media, ordinary radio looks positively antiquated.
words.exampleCn: 与现代大众媒体相比，普通收音机肯定 显得过时了。

words.meaning: 珊瑚；珊瑚虫 a. 珊瑚色的，红色的
words.example: According to the research, with a big requirement of decoration, there is a falling number of coral in deep ocean in recent years.
words.exampleCn: 据调查，由于装饰品的大量需求，近几年深海珊瑚数量锐 减。

words.example: Hundreds of residents in the village near the volcano were incinerated by the high temperatures generated by the eruption of magma.
words.exampleCn: 火山附近村子里的数百名居民在岩浆喷发产生的高 温中化为灰烬。

words.meaning: 可更新的，可再生的，可恢复的；可延长有效期的，可续期的
words.example: Scientists all over the world have made utmost efforts to develop renewable energy sources such as wind and tide power.
words.exampleCn: 全世界的科学家都竭尽全力开发风能和潮汐能等可再生能源。

words.meaning: 胫，胫部，胫骨 v. （手脚并用沿某物）爬
words.example: You should punch him in the nose and kick him in the shins without fear when a stranger tries to sexually harass you.
words.exampleCn: 当有陌生人试图对你性骚扰的时候，应该毫无畏惧地打他的鼻子踢他的小 腿。

words.example: Nowadays, more and more Americans have realized that they are being enslaved by the credit-card debt.
words.exampleCn: 如今，越来越多 的美国人意识到了自己正沦为信用卡债务的奴隶。

words.example: Generally speaking, animals in the zoo are timid and cautious in comparison with wild animals in the forest.
words.exampleCn: 一般而 言，动物园的动物比森林中的野生动物胆小谨慎。

words.meaning: 糟糕透顶的，可恶的；恶劣的，卑鄙的
words.example: Study shows that children who live in violent surroundings may use more vile languages than ordinary children.
words.exampleCn: 研究表明，与普通孩子相比，生活在暴力环境中的孩子可能会使用更多肮 脏的语言。

words.example: Because of the development of new energies, less and less diesel engines are used in daily life.
words.exampleCn: 由于新能源的开发，柴 油机在日常生活中的使用日益减少。

words.example: As its cars guzzle fuel, this car company has decreasing sales figures in recent years.
words.exampleCn: 由于其生产的汽车耗油量太大，该汽 车公司近几年的销售量一直在下滑。

words.meaning: 痛苦，折磨；令人痛苦的东西 vt. 折磨， 使痛苦，烦扰；纠缠；戏弄，捉弄
words.example: It is hard for the rich to understand that the poor from the remote rural areas are undergoing a torment.
words.exampleCn: 富人很难理解偏 远农村地区的穷人正遭受的苦难。

words.example: In recent years, the government has encouraged folk artists to revive traditional skills by funding them.
words.exampleCn: 近年来，政 府已通过资金援助鼓励民间艺人复兴传统工艺。

words.meaning: 不近人情的，残忍的，不人道的
words.example: In sweatshops, skinny men, starved women and small minors are in the same inhumane conditions.
words.exampleCn: 血汗工厂里，骨瘦如柴 的男人、食不果腹的女人和瘦小的孩子都在同样的惨无人道的环境中工 作。

words.example: Some people think that the government's housing policy now might imperil the whole real estate market.
words.exampleCn: 一些人认为政府的 住房政策可能危及当下的整个房地产市场。

words.meaning: （道路，线条等）分开，岔开；（意见、观点等）分歧，相异； 偏离，违背
words.example: They had been living together for ten years, but then their paths diverged.
words.exampleCn: 尽管他们在一起生活了十年，最后还是分道扬 镳。

words.meaning: 不合理的，不合逻辑的，荒谬的 n. 无理数
words.example: The theory that the earth revolves around the sun, put forward by Polish astronomer Copernicus, seemed to be somewhat irrational in 15th century.
words.exampleCn: 15世纪时波兰天文学家哥白尼提出的地球 绕着太阳运转的理论在当时似乎有点荒谬。

words.meaning: 口头的；言辞的，文字的，词语的；动词的
words.example: The engineer was too excited to give a verbal description of what the success of moon landing means.
words.exampleCn: 工程师太 兴奋了，以至于无法用言语表达登月成功意味着什么。

words.meaning: 含盐的，咸的 n. 【医】盐水
words.example: In medicine, saline is mainly used to kill bacteria. It is also widely used in cell biology experiments.
words.exampleCn: 在医学中，盐水 主要用于杀菌，还广泛应用于细胞生物学实验。

words.meaning: 使丧失能力，使伤残；使不能正常运转，使无效
words.example: There were so many people disabled and killed in the war.
words.exampleCn: 这场战争造成了太多人的伤残和死亡。

words.example: Customers were seduced into buying such household appliances as the washing machine and fridge by the offer of a free delivery.
words.exampleCn: 顾客受商家免费送货的利诱而买诸如洗衣机和冰箱之类 的家电。

words.example: The factory is to relocate its headquarters in the coastal area, which would create redundancy of 60 workers.
words.exampleCn: 工厂 将把总部迁往沿海地区，将导致60名员工失业。

words.meaning: 角；角度；观点，立场 v. 移向；使成角度移动；从（某角度） 报道
words.example: When you are stuck by a problem, you should change the angle to find some valid solutions.
words.exampleCn: 当你被一个难题卡住的时候，应 该换一种角度去寻找有效的解决方法。

words.meaning: 合法的，法定的；正当的，合情合理的 vt. 使合法
words.example: The majority of scientists believe it is legitimate to use monkeys in medical research.
words.exampleCn: 大多数科学家认为使用猴子进行医 学研究是合法的。

words.meaning: （工作、活动等）需要久坐的；（人）惯于久坐不动的；（人或 动物）定居的，不迁徙的；沉积的
words.example: People doing sedentary jobs usually eat less than those who are in more active occupations.
words.exampleCn: 从事久坐工作的人通常需要比那 些从事活动量非常大的人吃得少。

words.meaning: 水运的，水传播的，饮水传染的
words.example: Cholera, a water-borne disease, could cause severe diarrhea, vomiting and often death.
words.exampleCn: 霍乱是一种由水传播的疾病，能 引起严重的腹泻和呕吐，往往还导致死亡。

words.example: Kindergarten is the starting place for children to learn basic morals and how to get along with people.
words.exampleCn: 幼儿园是孩子们学 习基本的道德规范和与人相处之道的第一站。

words.example: With the increasing activities of the inner earth, the earth was shaking, the sea was roaring, and the volcano was pouring out molten rock.
words.exampleCn: 由于地球内部活动的不断加剧，地面在晃 动，海水在咆哮，火山在不断地向外喷射熔岩。

words.meaning: 加工机；加工工人；处理器
words.example: A word processor is the basic part of a computer to produce printed documents.
words.exampleCn: 文字处理器是电脑制作印刷文件的基本部 分。

words.meaning: 使湿透，浸透；使充满，使饱和
words.example: Since some Asian countries' investment markets have now been saturated, western countries are looking for a bigger market.
words.exampleCn: 由于一些亚洲国家投资市场现在已经饱和，西方国家正在寻求一 个更大的市场。

words.meaning: 使显得不重要，轻视，淡化
words.example: There's a serious social problem today that too many films are trivializing the seriousness of violent and sex scenes.
words.exampleCn: 当今有一个严重的社会问题，那就是过多影片都在淡化暴力以及 情色场面的严重性。

words.meaning: （武力或口头上的）攻击，袭击；侵犯人身罪；冲击；抨击 vt. 攻击，袭击；使难受
words.example: With the recent increase in sexual assaults, the police have taken action to curb the crime and protect women.
words.exampleCn: 随着近来 性攻击事件的增加，警方已采取措施遏制犯罪，保护女性。

words.meaning: 淫秽的，猥亵的，下流的；可憎的，可恶的；（数量）大得惊人 的，骇人听闻的
words.example: Many parents think the government should take effective measures to prevent obscene videotapes from spreading among the youngsters.
words.exampleCn: 许多家长认为政府应该采取有效措施阻止淫秽录像带在青少 年间传播。

words.meaning: 真品的，真迹的；真正的，真实的，逼真的
words.example: Scientists have derived authentic data about the age of the skeleton from carbon dating tests.
words.exampleCn: 科学家利用碳定年法得出了 这具骨架的准确年代。

words.meaning: 正义的，正直的；公正的；正当的
words.example: No matter how good and righteous one thinks his action is, he shouldn't break the law.
words.exampleCn: 不管一个人认为他的行为多么友善多 么正义，他都不应该犯法。

words.meaning: 使洁净，使纯洁，净化；提纯，精炼
words.example: As is well-known, one of the main doctrines of this religion is that people should try to purify their mind.
words.exampleCn: 众所周 知，该宗教的一条主要教义是人们要净化自己的心灵。

words.meaning: 群居的；合群的；爱交际的
words.example: Dr. Green, a famous zoologist at the Harvard University, claimed that wild goose remains gregarious during the migration.
words.exampleCn: 哈佛大学著名的动物学家格林博士称，大雁在迁徙中保持群居。

words.meaning: 无情的，狠心的；无生气的，没精打采的
words.example: In employees' mind, employers are cold and heartless, showing no concern for their welfare.
words.exampleCn: 在员工的心目中，雇主冷酷无 情，不关心他们的福利。

words.meaning: 滴注；逐渐灌输；逐步培养（感受、思想等）
words.example: Trust and encouragement can instil confidence into a person, which can serve him or her well for life.
words.exampleCn: 信任和鼓励能使 人逐步树立起信心，让他们终生受益。

words.meaning: 侵犯，侵害；违背，触犯（法规）；干涉，干扰
words.example: Some students argued that the new school rule would infringe on their right to read in the morning.
words.exampleCn: 一些学生争论说， 这条新校规将侵犯他们晨读的权利。

words.meaning: 可笑的，滑稽的；喜剧的 n. 喜剧演员
words.example: Henry's accident of slipping on the banana skin brought some comic relief to this boring performance.
words.exampleCn: 亨利意外踩到香蕉皮 滑倒给这场沉闷的表演带来了些许喜剧色彩，缓和了氛围。

words.meaning: 移栽，移种（植物等）；移植（器官等）；使迁 移，使移居 n. （器官等的）移植
words.example: Every year, tens of thousands of patients are given organ transplants in developed countries.
words.exampleCn: 发达国家每年有数以万计 的病人接受器官移植。

words.example: To Chinese overseas students, algebra or any course is not a real challenge, but using English anywhere and anytime.
words.exampleCn: 对 中国留学生来说，真正的挑战不是代数或是任何一门课程，而是随时随地 都要用英语进行交流。

words.meaning: 刺激（物）；激励；靴刺，马刺 vt. 刺激，激励，鞭策；（用马 刺）策马加速
words.example: Whenever the official holidays approach, many supermarkets spur the sales by means of promotion.
words.exampleCn: 每当法定假日 临近，许多超市就通过促销活动来刺激销售。

words.meaning: 野蛮的，粗鲁的；残暴的，残忍的；原始部落的
words.example: The animal protectors consider the idea of killing wild animals for pleasure extremely barbaric.
words.exampleCn: 动物保护者认为以猎杀野 生动物为乐的想法极其野蛮。

words.meaning: 失职的；违法的；拖欠的 n. 违法者，罪犯（尤指少年犯）
words.example: A recent research shows that there has been a sharp increase in the rate of juvenile delinquent related to domestic violence.
words.exampleCn: 最近的一项调查显示，与家庭暴力相关的青少年犯罪率剧增。

words.example: Since 911, American government has promised to take tough measures to retaliate against the terrorists.
words.exampleCn: 自从911以 来，美国政府承诺采取严厉的措施来反击恐怖分子。

words.example: Nowadays, there is a common phenomenon in society that more and more criminals make use of new scientific technologies to perpetrate crimes.
words.exampleCn: 如今，社会上出现一个普遍的现象，越来越多的 犯罪分子利用新的科学技术从事犯罪活动。

words.example: Over the next decades, our life will change a lot and our motherland will also prosper and be strong.
words.exampleCn: 再过几十年，我们 的生活会发生巨大变化，我们的祖国也会繁荣富强。

words.example: You cannot believe that most gorillas with scary faces and huge bulk like in King Kong are vegetarian.
words.exampleCn: 你不会相信大多数 像《金刚》里那样长相可怕身躯庞大的大猩猩居然都是素食动物。

words.example: He was so sluttish that his room was always a mess.
words.exampleCn: 他非常邋遢，房间总是乱糟糟的。

words.meaning: 锚；给人安全感的人（或物）；精神支柱；顶梁柱 v. 抛锚；使 固定，系牢；使基于；主持（电视节目等）
words.example: When a ship anchors, it means sailors can stay in the town for a short time to live as locals.
words.exampleCn: 轮船抛锚，意味着船员们 可以在小镇稍作停留，过一下当地人的生活。

words.example: If human beings continue to despoil the natural resources crazily, they will be doomed to be punished by nature.
words.exampleCn: 如果人类继续疯狂地掠夺自然资源，他们必将遭到自然的惩罚。

words.example: It would be discourteous for young people to ignore their parents' basic request for living together.
words.exampleCn: 年轻人无视父母 要求住在一起的基本请求是无礼的。

words.example: Gene is only an inborn factor in deciding one's intelligence, while a healthy diet and a good education are the extrinsic ones.
words.exampleCn: 基因只是决定智力高低的一个先天因素，健康的饮食习 惯和良好的教育是其后天因素。

words.meaning: 懒散的；松弛的，不严格的，马虎的
words.example: Much to our surprise, some companies have been lax in carrying out their social responsibilities.
words.exampleCn: 令我们大为吃惊的是， 一些公司在履行其社会职责方面表现得很懈怠。

words.meaning: 使增长，使兴旺；鼓励，促进；为…作宣传，宣扬 n. 增加，提 高；帮助，激励
words.example: Apparently, stock prices were boosted by the President's recovery report and supportive policies from the government.
words.exampleCn: 显 而易见，股票价格随着总统的经济复苏报告和政府的扶持政策而一路上 扬。

words.meaning: 胡乱涂抹；弄脏，弄污；诽谤，诋毁；变得模糊不清，把（图画 等）弄得模糊不清 n. 污迹，污渍；（显微镜的）涂片；诽谤，诋毁
words.example: Tony explained to the police that, the blood which was smeared on the front of his car belonged to a wild cat.
words.exampleCn: 托尼向警 方解释说，他车头蹭到的血迹是一只野猫的。

words.meaning: （执法时）宽大的，宽容的；厚道的，仁慈的
words.example: According to the recent survey, most of the job applicants prefer to work at companies whose rules and regulations are lenient.
words.exampleCn: 最新调查显示，大多数求职者喜欢在规章制 度宽松的公司工作。

words.meaning: 人造的；合成的，综合的 n. 合成物；合成纤维（织物）
words.example: Some clothes in the market including natural fibre silk and synthetic ones could not be crushed easily.
words.exampleCn: 市面上一些含天然 纤维真丝和合成纤维的衣服不易起皱。

words.example: Under the new law, Internet bars must enact relevant policies to prevent young people's admission.
words.exampleCn: 新的法律规定，网吧 必须制定相关政策制止未成年人进入。

words.meaning: 愤恨；对…表示愤恨，感到气愤
words.example: The elder sisters in the family would resent all the attention that the coming baby was getting, especially when it was a little brother.
words.exampleCn: 姐姐会对家庭里的新生儿，尤其是小弟弟，所得 到的关注感到愤恨。

words.example: Affluent someone may be born, but he is usually uncertain of how to create an admiring life with it or cherish all he has.
words.exampleCn: 有些人可能生于富裕之家，但却往往不知道如何利用其先天 优势来创造一个令人称羡的生活或是珍惜所拥有的一切。

words.example: White poplar, as the symbol of a real man, is always eulogized by writers for its tall and straight trunk.
words.exampleCn: 作为伟丈夫 象征的白杨树，总因其高大笔直的枝干备受作家们的赞美。

words.example: Many foreigners believe that traditional Chinese medicine cannot coexist with western medicine in the west.
words.exampleCn: 许多 外国人认为，在西方传统的中医很难与西医共存。

words.example: It can be seen that Yang Liwei's travel in outer space around the earth's orbit is a milestone of China's aviation.
words.exampleCn: 杨 利伟在外太空绕地球轨道航行可以说是中国航天史上的一座里程碑。

words.meaning: （犯罪、疾病等）猖獗的，肆虐的，泛滥的；（植物）蔓生的， 疯长的
words.example: If one day inflation is rampant, it means that people's increased wage will be worth nothing soon.
words.exampleCn: 如果有一天通货膨胀泛 滥成灾，那就意味着人们增长的工资很快就会一文不值。

words.example: As the recent experiment shows, prolonged use of the new drug might have harmful side effects on patients.
words.exampleCn: 最新的实验表 明，长期使用这种新药物可能会对病人产生有害的副作用。

words.meaning: 惨重的，毁灭性的；压倒的，决定性的
words.example: The atomic bomb attack in Hiroshima during World War Ⅱ was a crushing calamity to Japanese people.
words.exampleCn: 二战期间，在广岛投射 的原子弹对日本人民来说是一次毁灭性的灾难。

words.meaning: 无效的，无用的，无意义的；（人）没出息的；琐细的
words.example: Our attempts to improve performance are futile.
words.exampleCn: 我们努力 提高业绩，却付诸了东流。

words.example: Good books not only edify but also entertain their readers.
words.exampleCn: 好书不仅可以陶冶读者的情操，还可以娱乐读者。

words.meaning: 庸俗的，粗俗的，下流的，缺乏教养的；大众的，通俗的
words.example: It seems pretty vulgar to give a woman your business card in public asking for a date or dinner.
words.exampleCn: 当众给女性名片要求约 会或共进晚餐似乎非常粗俗。

words.meaning: 果心，果核；（物体的）中心部分；核心，要点，精髓 vt. 去掉 核
words.example: Any profit company's core is trying to transform its product into capital.
words.exampleCn: 任何营利性公司的核心都是要将其产品转化为资 本。

words.example: Many sociologists claim good living habits are not inborn but can be learned by hard-working.
words.exampleCn: 许多社会学家声称，好 的生活习惯不是天生的，而是可以通过努力习得的。

words.example: Some areas of the earth are not habitable because of extreme climate conditions, such as low temperature.
words.exampleCn: 地球上的一 些区域由于低温之类的极端气候条件而不适合人类居住。

words.example: Some scientists claim that the destruction of the rainforests is an ecological disaster that is threatening the survival of life on earth.
words.exampleCn: 一些科学家声称，雨林的破坏是一场生态 灾难，正威胁着地球上生命的生存。

words.meaning: 规定，明确要求；（作为条件）讲定，约定
words.example: The new regulation stipulates that every procedure has to comply to the relevant safety production standards.
words.exampleCn: 新制度规 定每一个步骤都要遵守相关的安全生产标准。

words.example: Some parents are concerned that a lot of violent films will be legitimized, which will pose a threat to their children's mental health.
words.exampleCn: 一些家长担心，大量的暴力电影被合法化会 对孩子的心理健康构成威胁。

words.example: Sometimes, what we suffered in life is not a totally mess, which might help us to crystallize pieces of thoughts.
words.exampleCn: 我 们生活中所遭遇的并不一定完全是坏事，有时也可以帮我们总结出一些想 法。

words.example: Solar-powered battery can transform the energy of sunlight into electric energy.
words.exampleCn: 太阳能电池能把光能转化为电能。

words.example: Learning in a warm and cosy classroom is the best dream these children in impoverished mountainous district have wished.
words.exampleCn: 能够在温暖舒适的教室里学习是贫困山区孩子们最大的愿望。

words.example: The huge roller can press melted metal into thin sheet which is the raw material of knife.
words.exampleCn: 大型滚筒可以将熔化的金属压成 薄片，作为刀具的原材料。

words.example: According to a survey by WHO, millions of people from developing countries are living in unsanitary conditions.
words.exampleCn: 世界卫 生组织的一项调查显示，数百万发展中国家的人正生活在不卫生的环境 中。

words.example: If the government condones violent conflict between the two parties, the bloodshed will never stop.
words.exampleCn: 如果政府无视两党之间 的暴力冲突，流血事件将永远不会停止。

words.example: Nobody can bereave wild animals and plants of their survival on the blue planet where we live together.
words.exampleCn: 没人能够剥夺 野生动植物在我们共有的蓝色星球上生存的权利。

words.meaning: 有错误的，有缺点的；不完美的
words.example: In addition to faulty brake, this terrible accident which has caused 3 dead and 1 injured, was attributed to drunk driving.
words.exampleCn: 除了刹车有问题之外，酒后驾车也是导致这起三死一伤严重事 故的原因。

words.example: Up to now, researchers and scientists cannot explain the whole enigma of Mayan civilization's disappearance.
words.exampleCn: 研究者和科学 家至今都无法解释玛雅文明消失这个谜团。

words.example: Unlike human beings, most fish are breathing with gills.
words.exampleCn: 与人类不同，大多数鱼类都靠鳃呼吸。

words.meaning: 闲置的；备用的，外加的；空闲的 v. 省出，抽出（时间等）； 饶恕，赦免；免去；不吝惜（时间、金钱等）n. 备用品；配件
words.example: Thank you very much for sparing so much of your time to talk with me.
words.exampleCn: 非常感谢您抽出这么长的时间与我谈话。

words.meaning: 幼儿教育的 n. 托儿所；苗圃
words.example: Whether the state should provide free nursery education or not is being discussed on the table.
words.exampleCn: 国家是否应该提供免费的幼 儿教育这一问题正在讨论之中。

words.example: It is well-known that the professor is expert in language teaching and semantic analysis.
words.exampleCn: 众所周知，该教授擅长语 言教学和语义分析。

words.meaning: （土地等）贫瘠的，荒芜的；不结果实的，不育的；无益的，无 效果的
words.example: Geographers made great efforts to find that millions of years ago the region was a barren desert.
words.exampleCn: 地理学家经过极大的努力 发现，数百万年前该地区是一片荒芜的沙漠。

words.meaning: 能传导电（或热）的，导电（或热）的
words.example: Scientists found that this kind of new material was more conductive at extremely low temperature than at the ordinary temperature.
words.exampleCn: 科学家发现，这种新材料在极端的低温条件下比在常温下 导电性更好。

words.meaning: 古怪的，反常的 n. 古怪的人
words.example: Psychologists are trying to find the reason why some children cultivate eccentric behavior to separate themselves from their peers.
words.exampleCn: 心理学家正致力于为一些孩子远离同伴孤立自己的古 怪行为找出原因。

words.meaning: 较差的，次的，低劣的；级别低的，较低的 n. 下级；下属，晚辈
words.example: In general, schooling in suburbs is inferior to that in downtown, interior regions to coastal ones, developing countries to developed ones.
words.exampleCn: 一般而言，城郊的学校教育不如市中心的，内陆的 不如沿海的，发展中国家的不如发达国家的。

words.example: The pace of export and import slackened during the last quarter due to trade barrier between the two countries.
words.exampleCn: 由于两国 间的贸易壁垒，进出口步伐在上一季度有所放缓。

words.example: Every great leader who has created great achievement has a mentor, who can advise, help and point him to success.
words.exampleCn: 每一个 创造了巨大成就的伟大领袖都有一个能够给他建议、帮助他并指引他走向 成功的导师。

words.meaning: 软垫；便笺本 v. （用软材料）填塞；蹑手蹑脚地走
words.example: Secretary always puts a pad by the telephone for taking notes.
words.exampleCn: 秘书总是在电话机旁放一个便笺本以便做记录。

words.example: Some states indicated that, it would be legal to get a remission if a prisoner in jail keeps an unblemished record in 3 years.
words.exampleCn: 一些州政府表示，如果服刑期的囚犯三年内没有任何不良记录， 就可以合法获得减刑。

words.meaning: 懒洋洋地站（或坐、躺） n. 等候室；休息室
words.example: Some students were used to lounging in the dormitory to surf on the Internet at the weekends.
words.exampleCn: 一些学生习惯于周末待在宿 舍，懒洋洋地坐着，在网上冲浪。

words.example: There is a crack in the front axle of the car which was found by the garage mechanic.
words.exampleCn: 汽车修理厂机修工发现汽车的前车轴上 有一条裂缝。

words.example: For tourists with special dietary requirements, we will offer a variety of delicious food for them to choose.
words.exampleCn: 对于有特殊 饮食要求的游客，我们会提供各种美食供其选择。

words.meaning: 妨碍，阻挠 n. 有盖的大篮子；盒装食物
words.example: Fierce storms have been hampering rescue work and there is now little chance of finding more survivors.
words.exampleCn: 猛烈的暴风雨阻碍 了救援工作，现在找到更多幸存者的机会已经很小。

words.example: The charitable work, which public figures, especially actors and singers have done, has been disparaged by the press as an attempt to get publicity.
words.exampleCn: 公众人物，尤其是演员和歌手，所做 的慈善工作被媒体贬抑为自我宣传。

words.meaning: 肉体的，身体的 n. （陆军或空军）下士
words.example: Some claim that teachers have no rights to treat naughty students with corporal punishment, while others hold an opposite opinion.
words.exampleCn: 一些人声称教师无权体罚顽皮的学生，而另一些人持相反观 点。

words.meaning: （文字）诽谤，中伤；诽谤性文字 vt. 诽谤，中伤，诬蔑
words.example: Recently, more and more movie stars are determined to sue the mass media for their libels, while they chose to keep silent in the past.
words.exampleCn: 最近，越来越多的电影明星决定指控大众媒体损害 其名誉，而在过去他们选择保持沉默。

words.example: Success in studying at school is not an appropriate criterion of achievement in life.
words.exampleCn: 在学校里学习好并不是衡量人生成 就的一个恰当的标准。

words.example: Reusable bag is an eco-friendly product which was famous for its slogan "I am not a plastic bag!"
words.exampleCn: 可再利用袋是一种环保产 品，它曾以“我不是塑料袋”的标语而闻名。

words.meaning: 捕食性动物；食肉动物；奴役他人者（尤指在财务或性关系上 面）；剥削者，掠夺者
words.example: To avoid being taken over by their counterpart predator, the company has made great effort and got fully preparation.
words.exampleCn: 为 了免遭强敌的接管，公司已经做了充分的准备工作。

words.meaning: 电报机；电报 v. 打电报，发电报；（无意中）泄露，流露
words.example: With development of technology, telegraph as a means of communication has been gradually replaced by mobile phone, Internet and other media means.
words.exampleCn: 随着技术的进步，电报这种交流方式 已经逐渐被手机、互联网和其他媒介所取代。

words.meaning: 偶然发生的，不定期的；由许多片段组成的，松散的
words.example: An episodic format is the writer's favorite, when he tries to relax by writing.
words.exampleCn: 当这个作家想要用写作来放松自己时，他 最爱用一种松散的形式来创作。

words.meaning: 侵犯（某人的财产）；擅闯（某人的领地）；利用（某物）；冒 犯，触犯
words.example: Farmers have barricaded their fields to stop wild elephants from trespassing on the land in the south of Asia.
words.exampleCn: 在 南亚地区，农民在田地里设置障碍物来阻止野象侵犯他们的土地。

words.meaning: 一千年，千禧年；（未来的）太平盛世
words.example: Millennium Bug was really bothering the scientists in 1990s, when the electron technology hadn't been developed as fast as today.
words.exampleCn: 20世纪90年代，电子技术的发展没有现在这样迅 速，“千年虫”问题在当时确实困扰着科学家们。

words.meaning: 易受影响的，易受伤害的；易受感染的；（人）敏感的，易动感 情的；能经受…的，容许…的
words.example: A large number of TV advertisement are aimed at susceptible young women who always buy goods they actually don't need.
words.exampleCn: 大量的电视广告瞄准易受影响的年轻女性，她们总是购买一些实际 上并不需要的东西。

words.meaning: 防腐的，抗菌的 n. 防腐剂，抗菌剂
words.example: In old times, the bodies of most of emperors were dealt with antiseptic for lasting for ever.
words.exampleCn: 古时，为了死后长存，大多数 皇帝的遗体都要做防腐处理。

words.meaning: 懒惰的，倦怠的；不活跃的，无行动的
words.example: As a rule, superior living conditions encourage children in rich family to lead an indolent life.
words.exampleCn: 通常，优越的生活条件促 使富家子弟过着懒散的生活。

words.example: In ancient time, Chinese people were usually brought up to be thrifty and hard-working.
words.exampleCn: 在古代，中国人在成长过程中常常受 到勤俭节约的教育。

words.example: In additional to a nutritious diet, a healthy body also depends on an appropriate exercise.
words.exampleCn: 除了营养的饮食之外，健康的身 体还需要适当的运动。

words.meaning: 上当者，受骗者 vt. 欺骗，愚弄
words.example: Most historians reached the conclusion that the Indian were innocent dupes, blameless in the battle.
words.exampleCn: 许多历史学家都得出 这样的结论：印第安人是无辜的受骗者，他们无需担负这场战争的责任。

words.example: It's dangerous to overfill liquid storage tanks.
words.exampleCn: 贮罐过 量充装液体是危险的。

words.meaning: 不可侵犯的，不容亵渎的，不容破坏的
words.example: What a man has experienced in the privacy must necessarily remain inviolable at any time.
words.exampleCn: 一个人的隐私在任何时 候都一定是不可侵犯的。

words.meaning: 惩罚，处罚；判罚；使处于不利地位
words.example: It's unfair that the whole medical staff should be penalized just because a nurse made a mistake.
words.exampleCn: 仅仅因为一个护士 犯错误，就惩罚所有的医务人员，这是不公平的。

words.meaning: 诋毁，中伤，诽谤（罪） vt. 诋毁，诽谤
words.example: Nowadays, it is not rare that stars sue the news agency for their slanders on their good reputation in the entertainment circle.
words.exampleCn: 如今，在娱乐圈明星指控新闻机构诋毁他们的名誉已屡见不鲜。

words.meaning: 恢复，使复位；修复，整修，重建；归还，交还
words.example: The government has been trying to restore public confidence in its management of the economy since the breakout of economic crisis.
words.exampleCn: 自经济危机爆发以来，该政府就一直试图重建公众 对其掌控经济能力的信心。

words.meaning: 有道德的，品性好的，品德高的；自命清高的；贞洁的
words.example: Compared with intelligent people, virtuous and hard- working people will be more welcomed in the office.
words.exampleCn: 与聪明的人相 比，品德高尚、刻苦工作的员工在办公室更受欢迎。

words.meaning: 迷信的；根据迷信的，由迷信引起的；受迷信思想支配的
words.example: The majority of people don't believe in the old superstitious saying that the number 13 is unlucky.
words.exampleCn: 大多数人都不 相信“数字13不吉利”这一古老的迷信说法。

words.example: Don't trifle that string of purple beads which values more than five million dollars.
words.exampleCn: 别小瞧了那串紫色的珠子，它价值高 达500多万美元。

words.meaning: 麦芽；麦芽酒 v. 把…制成麦芽；（谷物）变成麦芽
words.example: A bottle of 15-year-old malt whisky is taken out by the hostess to entertain her guests.
words.exampleCn: 女主人拿出一瓶15年陈酿的麦芽威 士忌招待客人。

words.example: Bush insisted on augmenting forces in Iraq, when his allies were withdrawing step by step.
words.exampleCn: 当布什政府的盟友都在逐步撤 退的时候，他还是坚持对伊拉克增兵。

words.example: On the contrary to traditional idea, many interviewers prefer candidates with agile mind to those with high marks at universities.
words.exampleCn: 与传统观点相反，许多面试官更喜欢思维敏捷的求职者， 而不是那些在大学取得高分的人。

words.meaning: 部落的，部族的；集团意识强的
words.example: At the first sight of tribal arts and dress on the island, tourists will certainly be attracted.
words.exampleCn: 当游客第一眼看到岛 上的部落艺术和服饰时，就一定会被其吸引。

words.example: If people were to precede the comprehensive notion of environmental protection, species would not face the situation of becoming extinct any more.
words.exampleCn: 如果人类早些对环境保护有一个全面的 概念，就不会有更多物种面临灭绝的危险了。

words.example: An injection did little to alleviate Jane's pain after operation.
words.exampleCn: 注射一针并没有缓解简手术后的疼痛。

words.meaning: 抗生素，抗菌素 a. 抗菌的
words.example: Although antibiotic can be used against infection, doctors won't persuade their patients to take it for a long time.
words.exampleCn: 虽然抗菌素可以用来防止感染，但医生并不建议病人长期服用。

words.example: Many valuable natural resources, like coal and oil, are in the verge of exhaustion because people are overexploiting them.
words.exampleCn: 由于人们过度开采，像煤和石油之类宝贵的自然资源正濒临枯竭。

words.meaning: 烧烤；拷问，盘问 n. 烤架
words.example: Our leader grilled us about why we were absent from evening party after meeting.
words.exampleCn: 我们领导盘问我们为什么缺席会议之后 的晚会。

words.example: Chinese parents try to inculcate a sense of social responsibility in their children when they are still young.
words.exampleCn: 中国 的父母在孩子很小的时候就试图向他们灌输一种社会责任感。

words.meaning: 野兽般的，残忍的；无情的，冷酷的
words.example: It was not the first time to report the brutal treatment towards prisoners by American army.
words.exampleCn: 这已经不是第一次报道美军虐待 战俘的情况了。

words.example: Study shows that some people are likely to avenge society once they are treated unequally.
words.exampleCn: 研究发现，一些人一旦受 到不公平的待遇，就很可能报复社会。

words.meaning: 侵略的，入侵的；（疾病等）侵袭的，扩散的；切入的，开刀的
words.example: Invasive species can do great harm to local plants and animals.
words.exampleCn: 入侵物种会对当地的动植物造成巨大危害。

words.meaning: 向上的斜坡；增加，改善 vt. 使（机器等）升级，提高，改进； 提拔，提升；改善
words.example: With the increase in terrorism attacks, more and more international airports plan to upgrade the safety check systems.
words.exampleCn: 随着恐怖主义袭击的增加，越来越多的国际机场计划升级安检系统。

words.meaning: （乘公共汽车等）上下班往返，经常往返；交换，抵偿；减刑 n. 上下班路程
words.example: Eventually, it is predicted that many people may be able to work at home instead of commuting at office in the future.
words.exampleCn: 据 预测，在未来许多人最终可以在家办公，而不用乘公交往返上下班。

words.meaning: 立法的，有立法权的；根据法规执行的；立法机关的 n. 立法机 关
words.example: The United Nations has taken new legislative measures to stem the flow of weapons into the developing countries.
words.exampleCn: 联合国已 采取新的法律措施来阻止武器流入发展中国家。

words.meaning: 区分，区别；差别对待，区别对待
words.example: The main aim of the management course is to teach us how to differentiate primary work from secondary work in the office.
words.exampleCn: 该管理课程的主要目的是教我们如何区分首要工作和次要工作。

words.meaning: 有感觉能力的，有知觉力的；知悉的
words.example: Because animals are living and sentient beings, they deserve special protection and respect.
words.exampleCn: 动物是活生生、有知觉的生 物，它们应该受到特殊的保护和尊重。

words.meaning: 灌，倒；倾泻，涌流；喷发；不断涌现
words.example: Old customers pour out of the shopping centres cheering wildly at the weekends.
words.exampleCn: 周末，老顾客欢欣雀跃地从购物中心蜂拥而 出。

words.meaning: 钩，吊钩，钩状物 v. （使）钩住，挂住；钓（鱼）
words.example: It is common in the Internet cafes that computers from different manufacturers can be hooked together.
words.exampleCn: 在网吧里不同厂家 的电脑可以联网是很普通的。

words.example: During three bad harvests in China, everyone must tighten their belt as a result of national income and foreign trade stagnation.
words.exampleCn: 中国三年自然灾害期间，由于国内收益和国外贸易的 停滞，每个人都要勒紧腰带过日子。

words.meaning: 善良的，人道的，仁慈的，慈悲的；（指学科）促进文明或教化 的，人文的
words.example: A series of campaign for the humane treatment of wildlife has been launched throughout the world in recent years.
words.exampleCn: 近年来，全世界发起了一连串的善待野生生物的活动。

words.example: Many companies want their new employees to quickly adapt themselves to working environment and infiltrate corporate culture.
words.exampleCn: 许多公司希望新员工很快适应工作环境并融入企业文化。

words.meaning: 违反，违犯，违背；亵渎；侵犯，干扰
words.example: The legislative should take measures to prevent the mass media from violating the public's privacy.
words.exampleCn: 立法机构应该采取措施 制止大众媒体侵犯人们的隐私。

words.example: Glacier Bay, located in southeast Alaska, United States, is a narrow inlet of the Pacific Ocean which runs from northwest to southeast for about 105 kilometers.
words.exampleCn: 冰川湾，位于美国阿拉斯加 东南部，是太平洋的一个狭窄入海口，它自西北流向东南，全长约105公 里。

words.meaning: （尤指疾病）遗传的，遗传性的；可继承的，世袭的
words.example: Albinism is a hereditary disease, which can be visual when the recessive gene does work.
words.exampleCn: 白化病是一种遗传性疾病，当隐 性基因表现出来时就会发病，显示性状。

words.meaning: 排出（物）；获准离开，免职；履行，执行；（债务 的）清偿 v. 解雇；释放；排出，放出；放（电）；完成，履行
words.example: Thousands of marine organisms were murdered as a result of a discharge of toxic wastes from a nearby chemical factory.
words.exampleCn: 附近一个化工厂排出的有毒废料造成数以千计海洋生物的死亡。

words.meaning: 抑制，克制 n. 反复句，（诗歌的）叠句；副歌；经常重复的评 价
words.example: The survey finds that the majority of people can refrain from smoking in public places such as theater and museum.
words.exampleCn: 调查发 现，在剧院和博物馆这类公共场所大多数人能够克制住不抽烟。

words.meaning: 支持的，支援的；赞助的；鼓励的；同情的
words.example: Children can often do better at school for they have supportive parents.
words.exampleCn: 有父母的支持，孩子们在学校常常会表现得更好。

words.example: If you go abroad for further study, it will take a period of time for you to accustom yourself to the new environment, the new culture and all the new rules and regulations.
words.exampleCn: 如果你出国留学，那么你需要花上一些时间让自己习惯新 的环境、新的文化和所有新的规则与制度。

words.meaning: 不可剥夺的，不可分割的
words.example: From my point of view, childbirth is the inalienable right of female employees who work in private companies.
words.exampleCn: 在我看 来，生孩子是在私企工作的女性员工不可剥夺的权利。

words.meaning: 品尝，品味；欣赏；体会，体味 n. 味道，风味；情趣，吸引力
words.example: Every day, people should afford a short moment to savour the gain and loss of the whole day before going to bed.
words.exampleCn: 每天，人 们都应该在睡觉前抽出片刻来品味一天的得与失。

words.example: Hypertension is usually an insidious disease which has few symptoms in the early stage.
words.exampleCn: 高血压通常是一种潜伏性疾病，早 期几乎没有症状。

words.meaning: 用泵抽（水）；涌出，奔流 n. 泵，抽水机
words.example: The villagers were tired of getting water from thousand miles away, so they invented an machine for pumping groundwater.
words.exampleCn: 村民们厌倦了到千里之外的地方打水，于是他们发明了一种可以抽地下水 的机器。

words.example: Astronomy is an extensive science, which can connect with physics, optics and astrology.
words.exampleCn: 天文学是一门涉及广泛的科学， 可以与物理学、光学和占星学相关联。

words.example: The acid rain in big cities can be hazardous to the environment where people live and their health.
words.exampleCn: 大城市中的酸雨会 危害人们生活的环境以及他们的健康。

words.example: It is necessary to segregate two groups of fans in the stadium, in case of unnecessary fight after the game.
words.exampleCn: 为了避免赛 后不必要的争斗，将体育场的两部分球迷隔开是非常必要的。

words.example: Scientists have found that tillable lands have declined sharply in recent years due to global warming.
words.exampleCn: 科学家发现，近年 来由于全球变暖，可耕种土地骤减。

words.example: Once the grass land is overgrazed, the vegetation will be damaged and the ground will become liable to erosion.
words.exampleCn: 一旦草 地遭到过度放牧，就会导致植被受损，土壤易于流失。

words.meaning: （作品等）表达，体现；具体表现，使具体化；包括，包含
words.example: As a rule, if you want to write a good essay, you'd better list some relevant examples embodying the gist.
words.exampleCn: 通常，如 果你想写出好文章，你最好列举一些体现文章主旨的相关例子。

words.example: Generally speaking, people will reciprocate the kindness that have been shown to them before.
words.exampleCn: 一般而言，人们以前受过别人 的恩惠，他们会进行报答。

words.meaning: 垂死的，即将灭亡的；即将结束的
words.example: There is a big problem at present that how the world economy can be revived from its present moribund state.
words.exampleCn: 眼下的一 个大难题是世界经济如何从行将就木的状态中走向复苏。

words.meaning: 隔离的，分离的；与世隔绝的，偏僻的；孤立的，孤独的；个别 的
words.example: Old people could easily become a socially isolated group, so they should keep moving and maintain interaction with the outside world.
words.exampleCn: 老年人很容易变成与社会脱节的一个群体，所以他 们应该不断前进并保持与外界的互动。

words.example: Nowadays, there is an interesting phenomenon that some bygone fashions, such as mini-skirt, become modish again.
words.exampleCn: 如今， 一个有趣的现象是一些过去的时尚再度流行开来，如迷你裙。

words.example: It is necessary for the government to make relevant laws to punish people who maltreat domestic animals.
words.exampleCn: 政府有必要制定相 关法律来惩罚虐待家养动物的人。

words.meaning: 难过，悲伤 n. 松树，松木
words.example: The old generation had been pining for home since the separation with families nearly half a century ago.
words.exampleCn: 在与家人分离 的近半个世纪中，老一辈一直怀念着自己的家。

words.example: In China, children usually cannot disobey the orders of their parents, but it is not the same situation in America.
words.exampleCn: 在中 国，孩子通常不能违抗父母之命，但在美国却不然。

words.example: Due to the moist weather without sunlight, the rocks near the river were easily covered with moss.
words.exampleCn: 由于天气潮湿、没有 光照，河边的石头很容易长青苔。

words.meaning: 多才多艺的，多面手的；多用途的，通用的
words.example: Because honey is versatile and not expensive, it is widely used in every aspect of our daily life.
words.exampleCn: 蜂蜜具有多种功 能，价格不贵，被广泛应用于日常生活的各个方面。

words.meaning: 不满，积怨，怀恨 v. 勉强做；不情愿地给，吝惜
words.example: Owing a grudge against somebody or something consumes one's energies and finally accomplishes nothing at all.
words.exampleCn: 对某个人 或某件事记仇会耗费一个人的精力，到最后一无所获。

words.meaning: 自命不凡的，自负的；炫耀的；做作的
words.example: The writer took a book review in pretentious language to express his biased criticism.
words.exampleCn: 该作者写了一篇书评，言语间满是自 负，表达了相当偏执的评论意见。

words.meaning: 征募；从军，参军；谋取（帮助、支持等）
words.example: At present, tens of thousands of volunteers are being enlisted all over the country to serve the approaching World Expo.
words.exampleCn: 目前，正在全国范围内招募成千上万的志愿者，为即将到来的世博 会服务。

words.meaning: 控制，抑制，约束 n. 路缘，（街道的）镶边石；马勒；起限制 作用的事物
words.example: The effective measure to curb the spread of the virus is keeping the computer off.
words.exampleCn: 控制病毒传播最有效的方法就是不开电脑。

words.example: Whether homosexuals could get married legally or not needs further elaboration.
words.exampleCn: 对于同性恋结婚是否合法的问题，还需进 一步探讨。

words.meaning: 势利的，谄上欺下的；自命不凡的
words.example: In current society, some people are very snobbish, who'd like to make friends only with people of wealth and of high social status.
words.exampleCn: 在当今社会，有些人非常势利，他们只愿意与有钱和社 会地位高的人交朋友。

words.meaning: 磁铁，磁石；磁体；有吸引力的人或物
words.example: Paris has always played a role of a magnet to attract people to seek romance and true love.
words.exampleCn: 巴黎一直扮演着一个磁铁一样 的角色，不断吸引着想要寻找浪漫和真爱的人们。

words.example: The illness on neck, which used to bother the elderly, is of prevalence among young office workers nowadays.
words.exampleCn: 过去常常烦 扰老年人的颈椎病现在盛行于年轻的上班族之中。

words.meaning: 寒冷的，阴沉的；阴郁的，暗淡的；没有希望的，不乐观的；荒 凉的；索然无味的
words.example: It's reported that many Americans faced a financially bleak Christmas last year because of the financial crisis.
words.exampleCn: 据报 道，由于金融危机，很多美国人在去年的圣诞节遭遇财政寒冬。

words.meaning: 【天】黄道 a. 黄道的，日（或月）食的
words.example: There is an angle between the ecliptic plane and the equatorial plane which is called the obliquity of the ecliptic.
words.exampleCn: 黄道面与赤道面之间有一个夹角被称为黄赤交角。

words.meaning: 罪恶的，邪恶的；残酷的，残忍的；凶猛的；恶性的
words.example: A group of tourists suffered a vicious attack by a gang of local people.
words.exampleCn: 一群旅游者遭到一帮当地流氓的恶意攻击。

words.meaning: 对…感到不满；嫉妒；勉强做，不乐意地做
words.example: The rich, who saw their income slashed, did begrudge sharing their gains with the poor.
words.exampleCn: 那些发现自己的收入大幅减少的 富人对与穷人分享收益表示不满。

words.meaning: 散布，传播；（光等）漫射；（使气体或液体）扩 散，弥漫 a. 扩散的，漫射的；（文章等）冗长的，难解的
words.example: Nowadays, Internet has become a powerful means of diffusing knowledge and information instead of television.
words.exampleCn: 如 今，因特网已取代电视成为传播知识和信息的有力媒介。
